cadence_note: Istat has no dataset-wide release date: each of the ~1100 dataflows follows its own entry in the national statistical release calendar (https://www.istat.it/en/press-release-calendar/), which posts releases on most working days. Flows range from monthly (prices, industrial production) to annual (crops, census-derived). Weekly is the coarsest cadence that still catches the monthly flows soon after publication; every run re-pulls each accepted flow in full, so a missed week costs freshness, never data.
